title: Korak 12

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Your third if statement should have an else clause.
You should log "Timmy is not old enough to drive." to the console within the body of your else clause.
tests.testString: assert.match(__helpers.removeJSComments(code), /const\s+timmyAge\s*\=\s*.+\bif\s*\(\s*timmyAge\s*>=\s*16\s*\)\s*\{\s*console\s*\.\s*log\s*\(\s*('|"|`)Timmy is old enough to drive.\1\s*\)\s*;?\s*\}\s+else\s+{\s*console\s*\.\s*log\s*\(\s*('|"|`)Timmy is not old enough to drive.\2\s*\)\s*;?\s*\}/s);

description:
Uslovna izjava može imati else klauzulu koja izvršava kod kada je uslov if netačan. Evo primera if...else izjave:

if (condition) {
  console.log("condition is truthy");
} else {
  console.log("condition is falsy");
}

Dodajte else klauzulu postojećoj if izjavi. Unutar tela vaše else klauzule, logujte "Timmy is not old enough to drive." u konzolu.
